Appearance:

Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., for Farmers Insurance Exchange/Plaintiff/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Farmers Insurance Exchange's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order.
